mapper.update:
UPDATE sys_template_file
phase = #{template.phase},
campus_name = #{template.campusName},
WHERE template_id = #{template.templateId} AND is_deleted = 0
mapper.select:
SELECT template_id, phase, campus_name, file_name, original_name, file_size, file_type, uploader_id, uploader_name, upload_time FROM sys_template_file WHERE is_deleted = 0
AND phase LIKE CONCAT('%', #{req.phase}, '%')
AND campus_name LIKE CONCAT('%', #{req.campusName}, '%')
ORDER BY upload_time DESC LIMIT #{offset}, #{limit}

SELECT COUNT(*) FROM sys_template_file WHERE is_deleted = 0
AND phase LIKE CONCAT('%', #{req.phase}, '%')
AND campus_name LIKE CONCAT('%', #{req.campusName}, '%')

SELECT template_id, phase, campus_name, file_name, original_name, file_size, file_type, uploader_id, uploader_name, upload_time FROM sys_template_file WHERE template_id = #{templateId} AND is_deleted = 0
